evals.expected_output: Shows account profile and subscription status
expectations: Calls get_profile to show recovery email, phone, and notification settings
Calls subscription_status to show current tier and features
Presents both profile and subscription info in a clear format

evals.prompt: Set my recovery email to me@example.com
evals.expected_output: Updates the recovery email after showing current settings
expectations: Calls get_profile to show current recovery settings

evals.expected_output: Generates and displays recovery codes with security warning
expectations: Calls create_account_recovery to generate new codes
Displays codes clearly for the user to save
Strongly warns user to save codes securely
Reminds user that doxx.net has no passwords and these codes are their backup

evals.prompt: What subscription plan am I on?
evals.expected_output: Shows subscription tier and pro features
expectations: Calls subscription_status with the user's auth token
Shows tier, status, expiry date, and auto-renew status
Explains what the current tier includes using pro_features map
